SEO.title: Info · Zomaar Zomert
SEO.description: Practical info on Zomaar Zomert: location, parking, accessibility, activities, paella and pétanque. Everything you need to know before the last weekend of July.

openGraph.title: Info · Zomaar Zomert
openGraph.description: Location, parking, accessibility and activities. Everything you need to know before you head to the field.

8.title: Activities
8.content:
Alongside the music, a whole week runs around Zomaar Zomert: the ZomaarBike, ZomaarRun, kids' animations, a quiz, a pétanque tournament and Sunday's paella.



Entry fees: ZomaarBike (€5/€7), ZomaarRun (€5), Pétanque (€5), ZomaarQuiz (€10).



Sign-up for the pétanque and paella is required. Register here:
